## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between NBD and GrowthX to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for SEO engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [NBD aims for $1M EBITA by year-end, with 50% of closed deals from outbound and 50% from other sources including SEO](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Target clients are Series B+ companies, ideally PE-backed, with sophisticated marketing needs and budgets](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Current content strategy is minimal; GrowthX will lead SEO efforts, leveraging NBD's authenticity and agency expertise](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Next steps include sharing additional resources, setting up CMS access, and preparing for a detailed strategy session](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3584.0)

## Topics

### Company Goals and Priorities

  - [Achieve $1M EBITA by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=843.0)
  - [Revenue targets: Q1 $657k, Q2 $882k, Q3 $1.1M, Q4 $1.3M](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
  - [50% of closed deals from outbound, 50% from other sources (referrals, organic social, SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
  - [Scale sales team with 1-2 new hires](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Shift towards proactive outbound motion targeting nonprofit and PEVC-backed sectors](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Series B+ companies, preferably PE-backed](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Sophisticated marketing teams or those lacking in-house creative resources](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Industries: B2B tech, service sectors, nonprofits (new focus)](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Decision-makers: Marketing leaders, heads of brand, demand gen roles (director level and up)](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [Clients running campaigns, events, or heavy on paid media/organic social](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)

### Current Content Strategy

  - [Minimal existing strategy; LinkedIn is primary organic channel](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Success from partnerships with B2B influencers](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Content focuses on agency profitability and operations, not services](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Authenticity and transparency in content resonate well with audience](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)

### SEO Engagement Expectations

  - [First significant investment in SEO for NBD](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=2068.0)
  - [Goals: Generate qualified meetings and closed deals from organic search](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Timeline: Expect first traffic spikes around month 3, refinement in months 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [NBD open to GrowthX's recommendations and expertise](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### Content Development Process

  - [GrowthX to lead content ideation and creation](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Will leverage NBD's authenticity and agency expertise](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Potential topics: agency best practices, creative partner selection, international team benefits](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

### Tools and Resources

  - [NBD to provide access to CMS (blog currently hidden)](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3358.0)
  - [GrowthX needs brand style guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3419.0)
  - [NBD to share sales call recordings, client videos, and other relevant materials](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3263.0)

## Next Steps

  - [NBD to add enabling blog functionality to internal to-do list](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3385.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up with specific requests for additional resources](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3392.0)
  - [NBD to provide CMS access and walkthrough for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3392.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin competitor analysis and topic ideation](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3451.0)
  - [Schedule detailed strategy session to review initial findings and align on content roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/eYBLEDGsHiqirGysA6s9DdnmwyoURpze?tab=summary&timestamp=3469.0)
